title: U.K. Ban on Pro-Palestinian Protest Group Is Lawful, Court of Appeal Rules
summary_full: The decision overturned a lower-court ruling that found that banning Palestine Action as a terrorist group had breached free speech rights.
summary_public: The decision overturned a lower-court ruling that found that banning Palestine Action as a terrorist group had breached free speech rights.

GB.label: neutral
